'''Desev''', also known as '''Desev Alpha''',<ref name="TWW">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/source/writtenword/index.html?page=1|text=The Written Word|int=The Written Word}}</ref> was a [[Binary star/Legends|binary star]] with [[Maugina]] in the [[Desev system]]. It was a [[Red giant/Legends|red giant]], and had been so millions of years before the Desev system was colonized. The [[Human/Legends|Humans]] of [[Desevro/Legends|Desevro]] bitterly joked that Desev had been a bright yellow until the first traders from the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] arrived.<ref name="GatORW" />

{{Star-stub}}
